mapper.sql: id, team_id, stat_date, checkin_count, member_count, checkin_rate, discussion_count, new_member_count, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_team_daily_stats ( team_id, stat_date, checkin_count, member_count, checkin_rate, discussion_count, new_member_count, create_time ) VALUES ( #{teamId}, #{statDate}, #{checkinCount}, #{memberCount}, #{checkinRate}, #{discussionCount}, #{newMemberCount}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE checkin_count = #{checkinCount}, member_count = #{memberCount}, checkin_rate = #{checkinRate}, discussion_count = #{discussionCount}, new_member_count = #{newMemberCount}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM study_team_checkin WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT checkin_date) FROM study_team_checkin WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND is_deleted = 0
